Description: Istio Gateway created to handle cluster ingress.
frontend-canary deployed with typo in PRODUCT_CATALOG_SERVICE_ADDR.
First recorded 500 errors and "context canceled" in container logs today.
Proof: GCP Cloud Logging filter (textPayload:500 OR context canceled)

Description: GKE Autopilot triggers node migration; replacement node registered.
SRE (Gemini CLI) initiated cluster-wide health investigation.
Root cause identified: opentelemetrycollector bound to 127.0.0.1 causing gRPC 111 errors.
Secondary cause identified: frontend-canary deployed on 2026-03-31 has a typo: productcatalogservices (extra 's').
Red Herring Clarified: paymentservice rejecting visa_electron is a legacy validation rule and NOT the cause of the current cluster instability.
Incident resolved: Remediation plan approved and postmortem drafted.
